videos.label: Magic!
videos.description:
The fifth in a series of videos discussing my upcoming RPG, "The Broken Empires", launching on Kickstarter October 1st. Today, I talk about the Tapestry of Reality, and those that pluck at its threads - the Spellweavers and Godbound of the magic system!

**ADDED: Regarding "Fraying" being hidden from spellweaver players, I think that actually they should be aware of the running total. With Piety, what is at risk is whether the miracle will work or not; with Fraying, what is at risk is the *very existence of the character*. It would be terribly unfun for a player to have that kind of "death" take them completely by surprise. There is a dice roll that is made for Fraying, so it's not automatic, but they would see how close to oblivion they are every time they make that terrible choice to cast another spell. A ticking clock is much more effective if the second hands can be seen moving towards the inevitable...

Preorder The Broken Empires RPG™ today! https://thebrokenempiresrpg.com/

videos.label: SEASON 4 VILLAIN REVEALED! with Lichdom RPG
videos.description:
Preorder The Broken Empires RPG™ today! https://thebrokenempiresrpg.com/

Join me in discovering the backstory and origins of Season 4's main villain as I play through the Lichdom game!

Spoiler Alert: The villain's a lich. Hard to have guessed, I know ;)

And no, this is *not* the RPG system I’ll be using in season 4. This is more like a one-off prequel :)

(FYI: There are 2 "commercial break" blackouts in the video. I'm trying from now on to manually place ads to minimize viewer disruption, as I've heard YouTube has ratcheted up the commercials.)

videos.description:
Preorder The Broken Empires RPG™ today! https://thebrokenempiresrpg.com/

Subscribe to the MM&D Newsletter: https://www.memyselfanddie.com/newsletter

EDIT: Somehow I described the rules backwards in the Ironsworn segment! You roll *over* the challenge dice to get a strong hit, not under. After doing 18 episodes of Ironsworn on this channel, you’d think I would have caught that… Ah, well. Mistakes happen!

videos.label: Post Session Reflection 2 - Linear vs Sandbox
videos.description:
Preorder The Broken Empires RPG™ today! https://thebrokenempiresrpg.com/

Subscribe to the MM&D Newsletter: https://www.memyselfanddie.com/newsletter

New series of GM tips for various games. After running a session, what did I notice about how to improve my GMing or to be more efficient?

Today's episode: Linear vs Sandbox style play, and my ruminations on each.
